cards.title: Your GPU is hoarding
cards.body: A 12B MoE model activates 3B parameters per token. The other 9B sit in VRAM doing nothing. That is the bug.

cards.title: Experts are a stream
cards.body: Treat expert weights as data in flight, not furniture. Keep the router and attention on GPU, stream experts from RAM on demand.

cards.title: The numbers
cards.body: Gemma-class MoE on a 16GB card: full GPU placement fails. Expert streaming runs at usable interactive speed.

cards.title: Placement is a choice
cards.body: VRAM limits stop being a wall when you stop treating model layout as fixed. Routing locality decides what deserves the GPU.

cards.title: Want the full picture?
cards.body: The essay covers prefetch heuristics, expert cache hit rates and where this breaks. 7 honest minutes.
